      Vaping never stops evolving. To get started:

      Why buy my electronic cigarette from VAPEVO?

      VAPEVO is the best e-commerce site specializing in electronic cigarettes (including disposable pods) and e-liquid at the best price in France and around the world.

      Our mission is simple, to ensure that all vaping enthusiasts or enthusiasts can vape with the greatest ease and lowest cost. This is why we offer free delivery with no minimum purchase in mainland France. Customers are rewarded every time they spend €1 on our site thanks to our loyalty program. Gifts and discounts are offered with each of your orders.

      On the way to becoming the new favorite of vapers, buy your cheap electronic cigarette, disposable pod and e-liquid from VAPEVO now.

      What is an electronic cigarette?

      An electronic cigarette, also known as an e-cigarette or personal vaporizer, is an electronic device that produces vapor by heating a liquid (e-liquid) using a battery. E-cigarettes are often used as an alternative to traditional cigarettes because they do not produce smoke, but rather vapor. E-liquids can contain nicotine or be nicotine-free, and they can be flavored with different flavors. Here are some benefits often associated with the use of electronic cigarettes:

      Do electronic cigarettes cost less?

      Regularly purchasing cigarettes represents a significant cost, which highlights the economic aspect of electronic cigarettes. By opting for vaping, your initial investment in equipment will quickly pay off, because it can be used over the long term. Thereafter, your expenses will be essentially limited to the purchase of e-liquids and coils. On average, a vaper spends around €50 per month, while a smoker can reach almost €300.

      If you want to further reduce your costs related to electronic cigarettes, consider making your own e-liquids using DIY (Do It Yourself). Another option, called Mix 'N' Vape, allows you to purchase branded e-liquids in economical formats, to which you can add nicotine boosters or nicotine salts. To simplify the process, our online calculators will assist you in the preparation of your DIY and Mix 'N' Vape e-liquids.

      Finally, to reduce your budget, VAPEVO offers a selection of electronic cigarettes at affordable prices, particularly in the form of packs. You will find in our catalog offers to discover vaping, including a kit and a selection of our most popular e-liquids.

      How to choose my first electronic cigarette?

      Here are some things to consider when choosing your first electronic cigarette:

      • Type of electronic cigarette: There are different types of electronic cigarettes on the market, including "pod" type electronic cigarettes, "box" models, and "tube" models. Each type has its pros and cons, so it's important to do your research to determine which one will be best for you.
      • Battery: The battery is a key element of the electronic cigarette, because it powers the device. It is important to choose a battery with sufficient capacity to meet your battery life needs.
      • Reservoir: The reservoir is where the e-liquid is stored. It is important to choose a tank of sufficient size to avoid having to refill it frequently.
      • Power: The power of the electronic cigarette affects the amount of vapor produced. It is important to choose a wattage that matches your personal preferences.
      • Cost: Prices of electronic cigarettes vary widely depending on quality and features. It is important to determine your budget before making a choice.

      It is also recommended to read user comments and reviews online to help you choose the e-cigarette that will best suit your needs.
